description_long: This is a rectangular, open-frame shelving unit constructed from light-colored wood or wood-like material. The structure features two main horizontal shelves, each divided into two compartments by a central vertical divider, creating four open storage spaces. The sides are solid panels, while the front and back are open, allowing easy access to the contents. The bottom shelf has two rectangular cutouts, possibly for cable management or ventilation. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, suitable for use in garages, workshops, or urban public spaces for organizing tools, books, or supplies.
description: A light wood open-frame shelving unit with four compartments and two rectangular cutouts on the bottom shelf, designed for accessible storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open compartments, central divider, and two rectangular cutouts on the bottom shelf.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid side panel and the depth of the shelving unit.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with open compartments and visible cutouts on the bottom shelf.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the solid side panel and overall depth.
